name: Endzone Girls
short_description: 《Endzone Girls》is a Tower Defense Game. You will collect resources and build fortifications before the zombies arrive to kill the zombies that invade your home. In the game, you will unlock different defensive buildings, create a unique style, defend your home in a world full of zombies.
detailed_description:
The story takes place after the outbreak of the zombie apocalypse. You and a group of survivors must build a base in a world overrun by the undead.

Game Features
✧ 4 story-rich chapters with over 15 hours of gameplay
✧ Supports both pixel and HD visual styles. You can disable either one. The pixel style offers a simplified look during dialogues, ideal for players who just want tower defense action.
✧ Over 11 unique [Survivors]. Choose one [Survivor] per run—each with skills that shape your deployment strategy.
✧ Raise [Survivor] affinity by deploying them in missions to unlock their personal stories.
✧ A wide range of buildings and units, each upgradeable in different directions. Combine with character skills to unlock unexpected effects.

✧ Gather resources and build your defense line before the zombies arrive
✧ Protect your base in a world crawling with zombies
✧ Construct and upgrade resource buildings during missions to build powerful towers and defenses
✧ Prepare carefully—before each wave hits, you'll need to secure enough resources to survive
✧ Unlock new types of buildings as you progress, and mix them to strengthen your defense
✧ Zombies usually come alone at first… but soon they'll charge at you in relentless waves

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
